confirm.clearTransferred: This will clear the school_id for all students with status "Transferred" who still have a linked school, making them available for re-enrollment in any unit. Do you want to continue?
confirm.createUsers:
This will check Teachers, Students, and Management Team.
All registrations WITH an email that are NOT a user will have a user created in Firebase Authentication with password "EDUCAFACIL2026".

This can take several minutes. Are you sure you want to run this?
confirm.fixExcluded: This will add the field "excluido: false" to all user, team, teacher, and student records that don't have it. This is necessary for them to appear in listings. Do you want to continue?

logs.runMigration: executed the tenant migration script to 13034243.
logs.runClearTransferred: executed school clearing script for {{count}} transferred student(s).
logs.runCreateUsers: generated {{count}} users in Firebase Auth in batch.

errors.noProfessorFound: No professor found for the email:

manual.title: User Manual
manual.subtitle: EducaFácil Official Guide
manual.description: Welcome to the official EducaFácil system guide. Here you will find detailed instructions on how to use each system module.
manual.adminNote: Note: The screenshots mentioned in this manual must be inserted by the administrator to reflect the most recent version of the interface.

dashboard.title: 1. Dashboard
dashboard.content: The Dashboard is the home screen where you have an overview of the school's or your classes' indicators.
dashboard.metrics: Metrics: View the total of students, classes, and teachers.
dashboard.charts: Charts: Monitor overall performance and attendance for the month.
dashboard.shortcuts: Shortcuts: Quickly access the most frequently used features.

students.title: 2. Student Management
students.content: Module for managing the student's entire school life, from enrollment to document issuance.
students.enrollmentContent: To enroll a new student, access "Students" and click "New Student". Fill in personal, address, and affiliation data.
students.profileContent: In the profile, you will find history, consolidated grades, and quick buttons for issuing documents such as: Path Term, Image Use, and Enrollment Declaration.

diary.title: 3. Classes and Digital Diary
diary.content: This is the heart of teaching work. Where attendance, content, and evaluations are recorded.
diary.attendanceContent: Select the class, date, and curricular component. Click on names to mark absences or attendance in batches.
diary.partialGradesContent: It is now possible to launch evaluations (AV1, AV2...) individually per bimester. The system calculates the bimester average automatically when syncing with the main report card.
diary.knowledgeContent: Record what was taught in each class, selecting the corresponding bimester.

reports.title: 4. Reports and Documents
reports.content: The system allows the generation of various official documents in PDF/HTML Print format.
reports.studentDocs: Student Documents: Enrollment Declaration, Image Use Term, Path Authorization, and Attendance.
reports.adminReports: Administrative Reports: Final Results Table, Staffing, P.S.E, and Parent Contact.
reports.academicReports: Academic: Report Cards, Grade Maps, and Attendance Diaries.
reports.tip: Tip: On the Reports page, use the search by Year > Class > Student to quickly locate who needs the document.

config.title: 5. Settings and Administration
config.content: Restricted access for managers and administrators for system maintenance.
config.mySchool: My School: Change name, INEP, logo, and manager's signature that will appear on documents.
config.users: Users: Manage access for teachers, secretaries, and the management team.
config.calendar: Calendar: Define school days, holidays, and meetings (this impacts attendance calculations).

profileSelection.title: EducaFácil
profileSelection.subtitle: You have <1>{{count}} profiles</1> available. Choose which one you want to work with:
